description: You are a trauma radiologist reviewing a cranial CT scan to document intracranial air (pneumocephalus) and paranasal sinus air space distribution following head trauma. The CT Cranium DICOM series is already loaded in InVesalius 3. A radiology request form is at /home/ga/Documents/air_analysis/radiology_request.txt. Create a segmentation mask for intracranial and sinus air spaces and generate a 3D surface mesh from it. Export the air space surface as an STL file to /home/ga/Documents/air_analysis/air_spaces.stl. Create a second segmentation mask for brain soft tissue. Place at least 4 linear measurements documenting the extent of major air pockets or sinus cavity dimensions in the slice views. Save the complete InVesalius project with both masks and all measurements to /home/ga/Documents/air_analysis/pneumocephalus_study.inv3. Login credentials: username=ga, password=password123
